# Snowflake Authentication Error Fixtures
# These represent authentication failures (expired, invalid tokens, etc.)

## Pattern 1: Token expired (390114)
390114: Authentication token has expired. The user must authenticate again. SQLSTATE: 08001

## Pattern 2: Session expired (390318)
ProgrammingError: 390318 (08001): Session token has expired. Please re-authenticate to continue.

## Pattern 3: Auth expired message
snowflake.connector.errors.DatabaseError: Authentication expired. Your session is no longer valid. Please log in again.

## Pattern 4: PAT invalid
PAT_INVALID: Programmatic access token is invalid or has been revoked. Generate a new token from the Snowflake UI.

## Pattern 5: Token mismatch
Token validation failed: token mismatch detected. The provided credentials do not match the expected format.
